title: verbascum delphicum
intro: Verbascum delphicum, also known as the mullein, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Verbascum delphicum lie in its ability to soothe inflammation and reduce fever, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of mullein include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and eczema, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce stress. Mullein can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or oil, and is often used to make salves, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
